core.label: CSS Fundamentals
core.description: Selectors, properties, layout, and the cascade.

topics.label: Selectors
topics.description: Element, class, ID, attribute, pseudo-class, pseudo-element, and combinator selectors.

topics.label: The Cascade & Specificity
topics.description: How CSS resolves conflicts — specificity, source order, and !important. The cascade is CSS's core.

topics.label: Box Model
topics.description: content, padding, border, margin. box-sizing: border-box simplifies sizing.

topics.label: Flexbox
topics.description: Display: flex for one-dimensional layouts. align-items, justify-content, flex-grow/shrink.

topics.label: Grid
topics.description: Display: grid for two-dimensional layouts. grid-template-columns, grid-template-rows, grid-area.

topics.label: Responsive Design
topics.description: Media queries, viewport units (vw, vh), clamp(), and mobile-first approach.

topics.label: Typography
topics.description: font-family, font-size, line-height, @font-face, and variable fonts.

topics.label: Colors & Backgrounds
topics.description: hex, rgb, hsl, oklch, gradients, background-image, and blend modes.

topics.label: Transitions & Animations
topics.description: transition for simple changes, @keyframes for complex animations. transform for GPU-accelerated movement.

topics.label: Custom Properties (Variables)
topics.description: Define variables with --name and use with var(). Enable theming and dynamic styles.
